description: Barrel Intelligence domain — 12 extension records for companion prompts 101-109, 201-203

defaults.edition_notes: Distillery: includes proof gallons, angel's share, and TTB fields. Winery: includes varietal, vintage, and appellation fields.
defaults.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Barrel Profile Lookup

steps.purpose: Resolve barrel identity, status, location, cooperage, and recent activity

safety_rules: Never fabricate barrel data — all values must come from getBarrelProfile
If barrel not found, suggest using searchItems to find the correct barrel name

prompts.name: Barrel Activity Timeline
safety_rules: Never fabricate barrel events — all values from getBarrelActivityHistory
If barrel not found, suggest using searchItems first

prompts.name: Barrel Cost Trace

steps.purpose: Resolve barrel identity, status, location, cooperage
Trace full cost history from acquisition through aging

prompts.edition_notes: Distillery: cost-per-PG, angel's share, proof gallons. Winery: cost-per-gallon, no PG fields.
safety_rules: Never fabricate barrel costs — all values from getBarrelCostTrace
Flag barrels with zero cost as data quality issues
If barrel not found, suggest searchItems first

prompts.name: Barrel Operations KPI Dashboard

steps.purpose: Generate portfolio-level KPIs: inventory metrics, period activity, aging distribution, angel's share

prompts.edition_notes: Distillery: includes angel's share analysis, proof gallon metrics. Winery: volume-only metrics, no PG fields.
safety_rules: Never fabricate KPI values — all from getBarrelKPIs
Flag unusual angel's share percentages above 15% as potential data quality issues

prompts.name: Barrel Aging Distribution

steps.purpose: Analyze barrel aging across the portfolio grouped by user-selected dimension

prompts.edition_notes: Distillery: includes proof gallons per age bucket. Winery: volume-only metrics.
safety_rules: Never fabricate aging data — all values from getBarrelAging
Highlight groups with average age exceeding 4 years as harvest review candidates

prompts.name: Barrel Inventory Snapshot

steps.purpose: Get current barrel counts grouped by user-selected dimension

prompts.edition_notes: Distillery: includes proof gallons. Winery: volume-only.

GROUP BY.hint: status, location, item, cooper, or batch

safety_rules: Never fabricate barrel counts — all values from getBarrelInventory

prompts.name: Barrel Portfolio Valuation

steps.purpose: Calculate financial value of barrel inventory grouped by user-selected dimension

safety_rules: Never fabricate valuation data — all values from getBarrelValuation
Flag barrels with zero value as potential data quality issues

prompts.name: Angels Share Analysis
prompts.edition_notes: Distillery only — angel's share requires proof gallon tracking. Not applicable to winery edition.

steps.purpose: Get angel's share data from harvested barrels for the specified period

safety_rules: Never fabricate angel's share percentages
Flag barrels with angel's share above 15% as statistical outliers
Note: distillery edition only

prompts.name: Cooperage Performance Comparison

steps.purpose: Get aging distribution grouped by cooper
Get inventory counts grouped by cooper for supplemental metrics

prompts.edition_notes: Distillery: includes proof gallons per cooper. Winery: volume-only.
safety_rules: Never fabricate cooperage data — all values from getBarrelAging and getBarrelInventory

prompts.name: Single Barrel Valuation

steps.purpose: Trace cost waterfall from acquisition to current

prompts.edition_notes: Distillery: cost-per-PG, proof gallons. Winery: cost-per-gallon.
safety_rules: Never fabricate barrel costs or values
Flag zero-value barrels as data quality issues

prompts.name: Barrel Location Map

steps.purpose: Analyze barrel distribution across warehouses, bins, and racks

prompts.edition_notes: Same across editions — location data is edition-independent.
safety_rules: Never fabricate location data — all values from getBarrelLocationMap

prompts.name: Harvest-Ready Barrels

steps.purpose: Get barrels in Ready to Harvest status

prompts.edition_notes: Distillery: includes proof gallons and cost-per-PG for harvest candidates. Winery: volume-only.
safety_rules: Never fabricate harvest readiness data
Highlight barrels over 8 years as longest-aged candidates
